title: myrtoleucodendron aspalathodes
side_effects: Myrtoleucodendron aspalathodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high concentration of tannins and essential oils. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to kidney strain and potential kidney damage. In some cases, the plant's anthelmintic properties may cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and respiratory issues. Additionally, its interaction with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, may exacerbate underlying health conditions.
